name: meu-mall-root
description: MeuMall H5 根目录命令入口。

scripts.dev:h5: cd hybird-meumall && set -a && . config/env/h5.local.env && { [ ! -f ../.env.local ] || . ../.env.local; } && { [ ! -f .env.local ] || . .env.local; } && set +a && pnpm exec next dev --webpack -H ${H5_HOST:-localhost} -p ${H5_PORT:-3109}
scripts.feishu:h5-overview-approve: node scripts/feishu/h5-release-notice.mjs mark-overview-approved --approved-by 唐游超 --approval-note 飞书审核群已确认
scripts.feishu:h5-release-approve: node scripts/feishu/h5-release-notice.mjs mark-approved --approved-by 唐游超 --approval-note 飞书审核群已确认
